How LMIG Works

Built on AI. Delivered to You.
Every Single Week.

No jargon. No noise. Just clean, AI-processed financial intelligence — delivered automatically every Monday morning.

01
🔍
AI Scans the Market
Every Sunday, our system scans 800+ NSE/BSE stocks using live data. No human bias. Pure data-driven intelligence.

Our AI processes the data, spots patterns, ranks opportunities, and writes a crisp 8-page report — in plain English, built for Indians.
